subtitle: in the app
title: Not vaporware. An app you install.
description: See DevSenses in action — galactic onboarding, streaming diff explanation, adaptive quiz that learns from you.

items.title: Calibrated to your level in 90 seconds
items.description: Intern, junior, mid or senior. 5 depths. 5 personas. Ends with a 4.5s galaxy animation.
items.alt: DevSenses onboarding screen with cosmic purple backdrop

items.title: The diff you wrote, explained line by line
items.description: Streaming markdown. Technical terms become clickable links. ⌘K opens cheat sheet for any snippet.
items.alt: Side-by-side diff with streaming AI explanation

items.title: Quiz that learns from you
items.description: Per-concept mastery. 4 levels (Novice → Mastered). Right 5 times in a row? Out of the quiz forever.
items.alt: Post-explanation quiz with per-concept mastery indicators
